mapper.sql:
SELECT R.role_seq, R.role_code, R.role_nm, R.sys_id, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_USER_ROLE_MAP WHERE role_code = R.role_code) AS user_cnt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY R.role_code) AS rsn FROM TB_ROLE_INFO R WHERE R.sys_id = #{sysId}
AND (R.role_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(R.role_code AS VARCHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_ROLE_INFO WHERE sys_id = #{sysId}
AND (role_nm LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CAST(role_code AS VARCHAR) LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT URM.user_role_seq, URM.user_id, URM.role_code, URM.sys_id, U.user_nm, U.dept_nm, R.role_nm FROM TB_USER_ROLE_MAP URM JOIN TB_USER_INFO U ON URM.user_id = U.user_id JOIN TB_ROLE_INFO R ON URM.role_code = R.role_code WHERE URM.role_code = #{roleCode} ORDER BY U.user_nm
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TB_USER_ROLE_MAP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND role_code = #{roleCode}
